nasb.text: The terror of a king is like the growling of a lion; He who provokes him to anger forfeits his own life.

esv.text: The terror of a king is like the growling of a lion; whoever provokes him to anger forfeits his life.

cnv.text: 王的震怒好像獅子的吼叫； 觸怒他的是自害己命。

ccb.text: 君王震怒如狮子咆哮， 触怒他的人自寻死路。

csbs.text: 王的威吓，如同少壮狮子的咆哮； 惹怒他的，会失去自己的性命。
